overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight or torch. A wooden bat or club is raised into view in the lower left portion of the frame midway through the clip. The footage appears to be from a survival horror or exploration video game with dark, atmospheric lighting.

The path is a narrow dirt trail surrounded by dense trees and grass, illuminated only by a flashlight. The atmosphere is tense and quiet with no other visible characters or movement besides the forward progression along the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person progression through a dark, oppressive forest trail that shifts from a state of vulnerable exploration to one of armed caution. It begins with a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense trees and grass, illuminated only by the stark, focused beam of a flashlight. As the camera moves forward through the tense silence, a wooden bat gradually enters the frame in the left hand, signaling a transition toward defensive readiness. The scene then winds further into the woods, with the flashlight cutting through the gloom as a large tree trunk on the right looms closer to the viewer. Finally, the camera continues its steady advance along the winding trail, maintaining a tight focus on the dark path ahead.
